---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a concrete improvement to Atlas OS Community
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Prerequisites

- [ ] I searched [open issues](../../issues) and this has not already been proposed.
- [ ] This is a **concrete, actionable** proposal — not a vague "it would be nice if…" request.

## Area

<!-- Chat / Voice / Atlas Home / Project HQ / Desktop Bridge / Docker / UI / API / Agents / Other -->

## Problem or motivation

What problem does this solve, or what use case does it enable?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behaviour or change you want. Include UI sketch, API shape, or code snippets if helpful.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Any existing workaround?

## Prior art / related issues

Link related issues or external references.

## Willing to implement?

- [ ] Yes — I can open a PR
- [ ] Partially — I can help but need guidance
- [ ] No — request only
